releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Critical Bug Fix: Nested Bullets Display
Version 1.0.9 fixes a critical regression introduced in 1.0.8 where nested bullet points were incorrectly hidden even when the "Hide sub-bullets" setting was disabled.

### What Was Fixed
- **Nested bullets now display correctly** ([#30](https://github.com/heliostatic/completed-task-display/issues/30))
  - Fixed Level 2+ bullets disappearing when Level 3+ items existed below them
  - Nested items are now only hidden when BOTH conditions are met:
    1. "Toggle Completed Task View" is active (hiding completed tasks)
    2. "Hide sub-bullets" setting is enabled
    3. The nested item is beneath a COMPLETED task `[x]` or `[X]`
  - Plain bullets at any indentation level are never incorrectly hidden

### Root Cause
The CSS rules for hiding sub-bullets in edit mode were too aggressive and not properly scoped:
- CSS selector `:has([contenteditable="false"])` matched ALL lines (fold indicators have this attribute)
- Sub-bullet hiding CSS applied whenever completed tasks were hidden, regardless of the hideSubBullets setting
- No body class to distinguish when the "Hide sub-bullets" feature was enabled

### Technical Changes
- **Removed problematic CSS rules** - Deleted overly broad selectors that were hiding sub-bullets in edit mode
- **Added body class management** - New `updateBodyClasses()` method manages both `hide-completed-tasks` and `hide-sub-bullets` body classes
- **Proper CSS scoping** - Sub-bullet CSS now requires BOTH body classes to be present
- **Simplified selectors** - Removed `:not(:has(.cm-list-1)):not(:has(.cm-list-2))` that was causing false matches

### For Users
If you experienced nested bullets disappearing unexpectedly in v1.0.8, this update resolves the issue. The "Hide sub-bullets" setting now works as intended - only hiding indented items beneath completed tasks when explicitly enabled.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/heliostatic/completed-task-display/compare/1.0.8...v1.0.9

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Live Preview Line Hiding Overhaul
Version 1.0.8 completely reimplements how completed tasks are hidden in Live Preview mode, fixing several long-standing issues and providing a much more polished experience.

### Key Features & Fixes
  - Fixed overlapping line numbers (https://github.com/heliostatic/completed-task-display/issues/28)
    - Switched from line decorations to CodeMirror replace decorations
    - Properly removes hidden lines from editor layout
    - Gutter line numbers now align correctly without visual artifacts
  - Improved Live Preview support
    - Tasks hide cleanly without breaking Obsidian's rendering
    - Toggle functionality works seamlessly in all view modes
  - Sub-bullets hiding feature                          
  - Added new setting to hide sub-bullets when parent task is completed
    - Works intelligently in Edit/Live Preview mode with JavaScript-based indentation detection
    - In Reading view, sub-bullets automatically hide when parent is hidden (standard DOM
  behavior)                                             
- Fully documented in README with mode-specific behavior explanations
  Technical

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/heliostatic/completed-task-display/compare/1.0.7...1.0.8
releases.name: v1.0.8 – Greatly improved line number support

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## v1.0.7 - Critical Bug Fix for Custom Task Statuses

This is a critical bug fix release that resolves an issue where the plugin was incorrectly hiding ALL custom task statuses, not just completed tasks.

### 🐛 Critical Bug Fix
- **Fix plugin hiding non-completed task statuses** - The plugin was hiding all task statuses except empty `[ ]`, including custom statuses like `[?]`, `[!]`, `[/]`, etc.
- Now only hides truly completed tasks: `[x]` and `[X]`

### What Was Broken
Previously, if you used custom task statuses (supported by the Tasks plugin, AnuPpuccin theme, or other tools), they would all be hidden when the plugin was enabled:
- `[?]` possible tasks ❌ (was hidden)
- `[!]` urgent tasks ❌ (was hidden)
- `[/]` in-progress tasks ❌ (was hidden)
- `[-]` cancelled tasks ❌ (was hidden)
- Any other custom status ❌ (was hidden)

### What's Fixed
Now only completed tasks are hidden:
- `[x]` completed tasks ✅ (hidden)
- `[X]` completed tasks ✅ (hidden)
- `[?]` possible tasks ✅ (visible)
- `[!]` urgent tasks ✅ (visible)
- `[/]` in-progress tasks ✅ (visible)
- `[-]` cancelled tasks ✅ (visible)
- Any other custom status ✅ (visible)

### Technical Details
Changed CSS selector from:
```css
[data-task]:not([data-task=" "])  /* Hide everything except empty */
```

To:
```css
[data-task="x"], [data-task="X"]  /* Hide only completed */
```

### Issues Resolved
- Fixes #3 - Main bug report about custom statuses being hidden
- Addresses #13 - Task status support request
- Addresses #19 - In-progress status support

---

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/heliostatic/completed-task-display/compare/1.0.6...1.0.7
releases.name: v1.0.7 - Critical Bug Fix for Custom Task Statuses

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## v1.0.6 - Bug Fixes and Modernization

This release includes critical bug fixes and modernizes the development infrastructure to current standards.

### 🐛 Bug Fixes
- Fix CSS syntax error causing parsing issues
- Add error handling for corrupted plugin data
- Improve CSS selectors for hiding completed tasks in edit mode
- Fix line number display issues in edit mode (#28)

### 🔧 Code Quality Improvements
- Update package.json metadata to accurately reflect the plugin
- Remove console.log statements from production code
- Add proper error handling with try-catch blocks
- Improve CSS organization with comments

### 🚀 Infrastructure Modernization
- Update TypeScript from 4.0.3 to 5.9.3
- Update Rollup from 2.32.1 to 4.52.5 
- Update all Rollup plugins to latest versions
- Update @types/node from v14 to v24
- Update Obsidian API to v1.10.0
- Modernize GitHub Actions workflow (Node 15.x → 20.x LTS)
- Replace deprecated GitHub Actions with current versions

### 📄 Legal & Documentation
- Add MIT LICENSE file
- Initialize Beads issue tracker for project management

### 🏗️ Build System
- Add "type": "module" to package.json
- Fix deprecated GitHub Actions warnings
- Ensure zero vulnerabilities in dependency audit

---

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/heliostatic/completed-task-display/compare/1.0.5...1.0.6
releases.name: v1.0.6 - Bug Fixes and Modernization
